title: PROCEDURE FOR ACCOUNTING OF ESTIMATED LIABILITIES BY BUDGETARY ORGANIZATIONS
author: Jabbarova Charos Aminovna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This article examines the classification of liabilities in budgetary organizations, their accounting by timing, type, and reporting. It also addresses current issues related to the recognition of estimated liabilities in accordance with Budget Liabilities Accounting Standard No. 16, their accounting, and proposes solutions
steps_raw: This article examines the classification of liabilities in budgetary organizations, their accounting by timing, type, and reporting. It also addresses current issues related to the recognition of estimated liabilities in accordance with Budget Liabilities Accounting Standard No. 16, their accounting, and proposes solutions
